commit.message:
fix: wrap long unbroken text in public profile About section Added break-words + overflow-hidden to the bio

tag so that text without natural word-break points (e.g. long strings with semicolons, no spaces) wraps correctly instead of overflowing horizontally. Same fix applied to work history and portfolio item descriptions. Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6

feat(preferences): add Addon Support variant download

Each version now has two independent download rows in the Installed
Versions group — Standard and Addon Support. Both can be downloaded
concurrently. Removing one variant immediately restores its download
row without requiring a restart.

- Add `addon: bool` to `DownloadVersion` worker control; rename
  `DownloadVersionComplete.version` → `version_key` (carries full key
  such as `"6.7.3-Addon"`)
- Introduce `parse_version_key` in cache and reshade modules so
  `-Addon` suffixed keys sort correctly after their base version
- Add `display_title`, `build_uninstalled_row` helpers in preferences;
  replace `active_version_op: Option<String>` with `active_ops:
  HashSet<String>` so both variants can be in-flight simultaneously
- Fix remove-then-restore logic: restore the download row for the
  removed variant immediately, regardless of whether the other variant
  is still installed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Single page with AI Match and Hybrid mode toggle.
AI Match: 6-candidate ranked list, filters, SOW auto-trigger.
Hybrid: same 3-tab UX (Shortlist, Human Recruiter, Active Trials).
One CANDIDATES array is the source of truth for both modes.
CandidateRow button now switches mode inline, no page navigation.
Sidebar AI Tools nav: Hybrid Match entry removed.
hybrid-match/page.tsx replaced with server-side redirect.

Fix nested formula evaluation with range functions

When a formula references another formula cell that uses a range function
(like SUM), the range list wasn't being set for the nested evaluation.
This caused formulas like =D41 (where D41=SUM(D38:D39)) to return 0.

Fix: In VariableEvaluate(), set the function database's range list before
evaluating nested formulas, ensuring range functions expand correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(r2): make upload failures loud instead of silent

R2 upload() now raises R2UploadError instead of returning None.
Callers catch and log.error with local fallback — no more silent data loss.
Retries increased 3→5, initial delay lowered 2s→1s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix webFetch: use CORS proxy directly instead of trying direct first

External websites don't send CORS headers, so direct fetch always
fails. Some browsers don't throw on CORS errors (return opaque
response instead), so the fallback never triggered. Now goes
straight to allorigins.win proxy with a 15s timeout.

commit.message:
feat: self-service refund with cancel/downgrade logic

- POST /api/subscription/refund: refunds last Paddle transaction (full),
  then cancels or downgrades based on remaining credits:
  remainingCredits = credits - planCredits;
  if 0 → cancel immediately; if > 0 and matches a lower plan → downgrade to it
- Eligibility: credits >= planCredits (no credits used) && no active interview
- Updated /api/subscription/refund-eligible to match the same logic
- SubscriptionManager: "Richiedi rimborso" button shown when eligible;
  success badge shows whether subscription was cancelled or downgraded

commit.message:
feat: stock-theme-app 전체 고도화 (Phase 1~5)

## Phase 1 — 안정성
- 종목코드 검증 스크립트 (scripts/validate_codes.py)
- themes.json 테마당 5종목 → 10종목 + name 필드 추가
- 네이버 API tenacity 재시도 로직 (3회, 지수 백오프)
- 알림 저장소 JSON → SQLite (aiosqlite, alert_history 테이블)

## Phase 2 — 시각화
- Dashboard 수평 막대 차트 (Recharts, 카드/차트 탭 전환)
- ThemeDetail 종목 등락률 바 차트 + 가격 범위 표시
- 테마 강도 히스토리 수집 (10분 주기) + API + 라인 차트

## Phase 3 — 기능 확장
- 종목 검색 API + SearchBar + StockModal 팝업
- 즐겨찾기 (localStorage, 탭 필터)
- 종목 상세 API (52주 최고/최저, PER, PBR, 시가총액)
- 알림 활성/비활성 토글 (PATCH API)
- 알림 이력 페이지 (GET /alerts/history)

## Phase 4 — UX/UI
- ThemeCard 스켈레톤 로딩 UI
- React ErrorBoundary
- Toast 알림 (생성/삭제 피드백)
- 모바일 반응형 (1열/2열/4열 그리드, 테이블 가로 스크롤)
- 다크모드 (CSS 변수 시스템, useTheme 훅, IndexBar 토글 버튼)

## Phase 5 — 배포
- nginx 내장 Docker 구조 (SPA 라우팅, API/WS 프록시)
- docker-compose.yml 재정비 (db_data 볼륨, healthcheck)
- GitHub Actions CI/CD (backend pytest, frontend build, docker build)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Build full SaaS dashboard with sidebar navigation

Complete dashboard redesign inspired by BabyLoveGrowth.ai:
- Dark theme sidebar with navigation (Overview, Content Plan, Analytics, Audit, Backlinks, Settings)
- Overview: welcome banner, LLM Visibility / Domain Rating / Health Score cards, potential reach by language, publish CTA

- Analytics: visitor stats, impressions, keyword positions, CTR, traffic chart
- Technical Audit: score circle, category breakdown (Performance, SEO, Accessibility, Content), issues list with severity
- Backlinks: empty state with CTA
- Settings: account info, site config, brand colors, danger zone
- Loads onboarding data from localStorage to personalize
- Mobile responsive with hamburger menu
- Auth protected via requireAuth()

- 파일 월과 주차 레이블 월 불일치 시 제외 (2월파일의 3월1주 중복 방지)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: panic_on_oops + ConfigFS USB ADB for MSM8953 Android Things kernel

Add init.recovery.msm8x53.rc (imported by TWRP ramdisk on boot via
init.recovery.${ro.hardware}.rc):

1. panic_on_oops 0: stock Android Things kernel triggers MDSS oops on
   TWRP display init → panic_on_oops=1 (main init.rc) causes immediate
   reboot → black screen. Override to 0 to allow graceful recovery.

2. ConfigFS USB: kernel uses CONFIG_USB_CONFIGFS (not legacy android_usb).
   init.recovery.usb.rc writes to /sys/class/android_usb/android0/ which
   doesn't exist → ADB never starts. Added proper ConfigFS gadget init
   with ffs.adb function and dwc3 UDC binding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

The 5-second setInterval calling navigator.clipboard.readText()
was triggering repeated permission prompts and crashing the tab.
Now reads clipboard once per button click with no polling.

commit.message:
fix: decouple translations from image loading to prevent timeout

The previous approach ran up to 4 sequential Gemini calls inside
fetchAllImageCache before returning any entries, easily exceeding
Vercel's 10s function timeout and causing no images to load.

- fetchAllImageCache now returns entries immediately (fast Firestore
  read only, no Gemini calls).
- A new translateMissingEntries action handles translations separately.
- The component fires translations as a parallel, non-blocking Promise
  after the images are already visible on screen.
- Added .catch() guards so neither step can crash the component.

commit.message:
Add two new research essays on AI adoption

- The Six Percent: Why Most AI Investment Doesn't Return
  McKinsey 88/6 gap, Atlassian productivity paradox, what top performers
  actually do differently (dedicated ownership, structured enablement,
  workflow redesign). Data-driven, no fluff.

- The Mandate Trap: Why AI Mandates Fail Without Enablement
  Shopify vs. Duolingo comparison — same memo, opposite outcomes.
  Shopify had 3 years of infrastructure. Duolingo didn't. The mandate
  is the announcement after the strategy works, not the strategy itself.

Updated research index to list both essays at top.

  giving the agent invisible per-user memory for personalization.
- Auth: stores snapfare_auth_ts in localStorage on sign-in/signup.
- Dashboard: enforces 30-day session — auto-logs out if auth_ts > 30 days.

commit.message:
Add multi-source documentation viewer (#826)

## Summary

- Add hoist-core documentation to the Docs tab alongside existing
hoist-react docs, with a two-level tree navigation (source > category >
doc) and source badges in search results.
- Replace webpack static asset imports with a server-side `DocsService`
that dynamically resolves doc content from either local sibling repos
(for development) or GitHub tarballs (for tagged/published versions).
- Server-side: `ContentSource` abstraction, unified `DocRegistry` with
entries for both frameworks, `DocsController` REST endpoints
(`/docs/registry`, `/docs/content`).
- Client-side: `DocService` fetches from server API, `docRegistry.ts`
simplified to types + utilities, breadcrumb shows source context.

## Test plan

- [ ] Start toolbox with `runHoistInline=true` and sibling repos present
— Docs tab should show both Hoist React and Hoist Core sections loading
from local filesystems
- [ ] Start toolbox with `runHoistInline=false` — should download GitHub
tarballs and serve docs from cached archives
- [ ] Search for a term that appears in both frameworks (e.g.
"authentication") — results should include entries from both sources
with source badges
- [ ] Click through the tree — both root sections should expand to show
categories and docs with correct content rendering
- [ ] Verify `curl localhost:8080/docs/registry` returns JSON with
entries from both sources
- [ ] Verify inter-doc links still navigate correctly within hoist-react
docs

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: split draft generation into research + write phases

Adds POST /api/drafts/research endpoint that uses Anthropic's
web_search_20250305 tool to find real sources, statistics, and
SEO keywords. The generate endpoint now accepts optional
researchContext to produce source-backed blog posts.

Two-phase approach keeps each call under Netlify's 26s timeout.
The frontend calls research first, then generate with the results.

commit.message:
feat(dashboard): use cumulative week budget for weekly summary

- Weekly now shows cumulative budget (week 1 + week 2 + ...)
- For week 2: budget = dailyBudget × 14 (not dailyBudget × daysElapsed)
- Label shows "week X" instead of days approximation
- This makes weekly budget consistent with weekly allocation

Example (11 days, week 2):
- Daily: Rp 671.500 / Rp 568.965 (11 days) → Over
- Weekly: Rp 671.500 / Rp 724.137 (week 2) → Under by Rp 52.637

commit.message:
feat: build prompt intelligence page at /dashboard/prompts

New page accessible from sidebar "Prompt" link. Fetches all audit_results
across completed audits for the user's workspaces and displays them in a
filterable table.

Layout:
- Summary cards: total prompts, mention rate (color-coded), awareness stage
  rate, decision stage rate
- Filter bar: tabs (Semua/Disebut/Tidak disebut), workspace dropdown
  (multi-brand), search input
- Table: status icon, prompt text, brand name, funnel stage badge, audit date
- Clicking a row opens the shared PromptDetailModal with full AI response

Data flow: queries workspaces → audits (complete only) → audit_results,
cross-references prompts table for stage info. All client-side via
Supabase browser client with RLS.

presents a multi-select checklist for confirmation before running.

commit.message:
fix(outcomes): persist reclassified outcomes back to JSONL on hydration (#1515)

Reclassification was running in-memory on each startup but never writing
corrected entries back to disk. The 217 stale "unknown" entries kept
re-appearing in weather reports. Now rewriteFile() flushes the corrected
state to disk after reclassification, fixing them permanently.

layout redirects unauthenticated visitors to /login.

- Remove app/(dashboard)/profile/[id]/ (auth-gated, now deleted)

  for guests; Dashboard link + avatar for authenticated users
- Add app/(public)/profile/[id]/page.tsx — fully public, no auth
  required; guests see "Contact Contractor → Login" CTA with a
  sign-up nudge card; authenticated users see "Send Message"

  Preview button (opens profile in new tab)

commit.message:
refactor: remove embedding/RAG stack and clean up all dependent code

Drop the TEI embedding container and all application code that depended
on it: embeddingservice, ragservice, search routes, embedding DB queries,
and the pkgs/embedding HTTP client. The consulting SSE stream no longer
supports RAG mode; the VersionRepository interface no longer exposes
UpdateEmbedding. Also fixes a header-ordering bug in stream.go where SSE
headers were written before confirming flusher support, and removes the
dead Ping() method from SSEWriter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(voice): redirect silently outside office hours without announcing closure

When a call arrives outside configured office hours, skip the <Say> message
entirely and go straight to <Dial handoffPhone>. From the caller's perspective
it feels like a normal ring-through to the school's number with no AI in between.

feat: add image quality scoring to images/refresh cron

Add scoreImage() function that scores Unsplash images based on blur hash
presence and randomized variety. Google Places images get a default score
of 50. The refresh flow now fetches 15 images, scores/filters them, sorts
by quality descending, and stores the top 5 with quality_score field.
Highest-scored image is marked as is_primary.

Tests: 11 new/updated tests covering scoreImage logic, auth guards,
quality scoring in batch processing, is_primary assignment, and top-5
filtering.
